source.authority: Office of the Prime Minister of The Bahamas and Ministry of Finance of Kuwait
source.scope: Official-source-backed no-PIT scopes for Bahamas individual personal income and Kuwait natural-person employment income outside the corporate-body tax scope.

BS.notes: Individual personal income; consumption, property, business, multinational top-up tax and National Insurance obligations excluded.

register.coverageSummary: Individual personal income; other taxes, business obligations and National Insurance remain separate.

KW.notes: Natural-person employment remuneration outside income attributed to a corporate body carrying on trade or business in Kuwait.

register.coverageSummary: Natural-person employment remuneration outside the corporate-body income-tax scope.
